sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὑψόω

- Transliteration: Hupsoo

- Phonetic: hoop-so'-o

- Definition:

1. to lift up on high, to exalt

2. metaph.

a. to raise to the very summit of opulence and prosperity

b. to exalt, to raise to dignity, honour and happiness

- Origin: from G5311

- TDNT entry: 18:06,1

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G5311; to elevate (literally or figuratively): - exalt lift up.
